name: exfig-plugins
description: ExFig plugin marketplace — Claude Code plugins for Figma design export

plugins.name: exfig-mcp
plugins.description: ExFig MCP server integration — validate configs, inspect Figma resources, export tokens

plugins.name: exfig-setup
plugins.description: Interactive setup wizard: install ExFig, configure Figma token, generate PKL config, first export

plugins.name: exfig-config-review
plugins.description: Review and optimize exfig.pkl configuration — detect issues, suggest improvements

plugins.name: exfig-troubleshooting
plugins.description: Diagnose ExFig errors — error catalog, common fixes, environment checks

plugins.name: exfig-migration
plugins.description: Migrate ExFig between major versions — breaking changes, config updates, deprecations

plugins.name: exfig-rules
plugins.description: Coding conventions for projects using ExFig — naming, structure, CI patterns
